title: Account & Human Resources Manager
description:
• Join a stable and established organization
  • Strong culture of operational excellence and growth

About Our Client

Our client is a well‑established multinational logistics group with a global presence, headquartered in Hong Kong. They manage end‑to‑end logistics, forwarding, and supply chain solutions for international clients and has more than 30 offices globally.

Job Description

  • Manage the full set of accounts independently.
  • Prepare and submit tax filings and ensure statutory compliance.
  • Oversee financial accounting functions, including fixed asset management.
  • Prepare monthly management reports and statutory financial statements.
  • Support the annual budgeting process.
  • Analyze financial data and business metrics to support management decision-making.
  • Coordinate with auditors, corporate secretarial service providers and other external stakeholders.
  • Responsible for full spectrum of HR and admin operations, including payroll, attendance and leave management, insurance, CPF contributions, and tax submissions.
  • Handle recruitment, onboarding, offboarding, HR reporting and HR system maintenance.
  • Provide HR and administrative support to the Singapore office and field team.
  • Manage tenancy agreements, service contracts, business license renewals, procurement, payments, and general office administration.
  • Maintain proper documentation in accordance with internal guidelines.
  • Liaise closely with local management and the Hong Kong head office.
  • Perform any ad hoc duties assigned.

The Successful Applicant

  • Degree in Accounting or equivalent
  • 3 years of hands-on experience covering accounting, HR, and office administration
  • Understanding of Singapore employment laws and statutory regulations
  • Well-organized, responsible, and results-driven

What's on Offer

  • A independent contributor role with significant ownership across finance, HR, and admin operations.
  • Direct visibility and interaction with both Singapore leadership and Hong Kong headquarters.
  • Stable and supportive work environment backed by a reputable global logistics brand.
